page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and utilizing a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. The processor's instruction set support, including AVX-512 and cryptography extensions like AES and SHA_NI, contributes to strong performance in encryption and extended instruction tests. Memory performance is highlighted by a strong cached read-only bandwidth, though large-block uncached read and write speeds remain in the average tier. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and static web serving throughput also demonstrate top-tier capabilities.

Given its high core density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.c7.16xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for compute-bound workloads that require predictable, non-shared CPU resources. The lack of bundled local storage means storage costs are externalized to network volumes, which is a key architectural tradeoff. It is highly suited for multi-threaded batch processing, static web serving, database operations, and CPU-based machine learning inference for small to medium models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM (2.0 GB per core) and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. It delivers strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by top-tier stress-ng and PassMark CPU benchmarks, alongside robust capabilities in multi-threaded decompression, database operations, and static web serving. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance for compute-intensive tasks, though users must provision external network storage. It is highly suited for multi-threaded batch processing, database workloads, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized platform designed for high-throughput multi-threaded processing, database operations, and network-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and static web serving performance
Optimized for multi-threaded batch processing and CPU-based ML inference
No bundled local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
